utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , I feel like a snack !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Do you want some shortbread ? Eh that is Scottish like you are .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh no thanks . I do not like anything from my Scottish heritage .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I do not like anything from my Scottish heritage .
3_I do not like anything from my Scottish heritage .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well it is just my entire family was run out of Scotland by ... Vikings . Anyway , lots of bad memories .

emotion_cause.span: 5_my entire family was run out of Scotland by ... Vikings .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh well , it sounds to me like your family is ready to uh , rediscover its Scottish roots .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You can not play bagpipes at the wedding ! !

emotion_cause.span: 7_You can not play bagpipes at the wedding ! !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: How did you know about that ? !
